title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Orient Electric Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Orient Electric Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Amritsar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Orient Electric Ventures Solutions:
Orient Electric Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric Ventures Solutions!
